parameters.query: SELECT json_build_object('date',CURRENT_DATE,'opps_total',(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker),'opps_high_fit',(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE COALESCE(eis_fit_score,0)>=80),'risks_critical',COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_risk_register WHERE severity='CRITICAL' AND status!='Dismissed'),0),'risks_total',COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_risk_register WHERE status!='Dismissed'),0)) as brief;
